alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing epigallocatechin or a derivative. Epigallocatechin is a flavan-3-ol containing a benzopyran-3,5,7-triol linked to a 3,4,5-hydroxyphenyl moiety.
alternative_parents.name: Epigallocatechins

alternative_parents.description: Flavonoids that bear one hydroxyl group at the C-3' position of the flavonoid skeleton.
alternative_parents.name: 3'-hydroxyflavonoids

alternative_parents.description: Flavonoids that bear one hydroxyl group at the C-4' position of the flavonoid skeleton.
alternative_parents.name: 4'-hydroxyflavonoids

alternative_parents.description: Flavonoids that bear one hydroxyl group at the C-5 position of the flavonoid skeleton.
alternative_parents.name: 5-hydroxyflavonoids

alternative_parents.description: Flavonoids that bear one hydroxyl group at the C-7 position of the flavonoid skeleton.
alternative_parents.name: 7-hydroxyflavonoids

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds that contain an ester derivative of 3,4,5-trihydroxybenzoic acid.
alternative_parents.name: Galloyl esters

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing a benzoic acid, which is esterified with an alkyl group and para-substituted with a hydroxyl group.
alternative_parents.name: p-Hydroxybenzoic acid alkyl esters

alternative_parents.description: Benzoic acid esters where the benzene ring is meta-substituted with a hydroxy group.
alternative_parents.name: m-Hydroxybenzoic acid esters

alternative_parents.description: Organic aromatic compounds that 1-benzopyran, a bicyclic compound made up of a benzene ring fused to a pyran, so that the oxygen atom is at the 1-position.
alternative_parents.name: 1-benzopyrans

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a 1,2,3-trihydroxybenzene moiety.
alternative_parents.name: Pyrogallols and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an acyl moiety of benzoic acid with the formula (C6H5CO-).
alternative_parents.name: Benzoyl derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the alkyl aryl ether functional group with the generic formula R-O-R' , where R is an alkyl group and R' is an aryl group.
alternative_parents.name: Alkyl aryl ethers

alternative_parents.description: Phenols that are unsubstituted at the 4-position.
alternative_parents.name: 1-hydroxy-4-unsubstituted benzenoids

alternative_parents.description: Phenols that a unsubstituted at the 2-position.
alternative_parents.name: 1-hydroxy-2-unsubstituted benzenoids

alternative_parents.description: Carboxylic acid derivatives in which the carbon atom from the carbonyl group is attached to an alkyl or an aryl moiety through an oxygen atom (forming an ester group).
alternative_parents.name: Carboxylic acid esters

alternative_parents.description: Carboxylic acids containing exactly one carboxyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Monocarboxylic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one oxygen atom linked to a ring carbon.
alternative_parents.name: Oxacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing more than one hydroxyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Polyols

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Plant secondary metabolites that contain the 2-phenylchromene skeleton. Plant secondary metabolites that contain the 2-phenylchromene skeleton.
class.name: Flavonoids

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as catechin gallates. These are organic compounds containing a gallate moiety glycosidically linked to a catechin.

direct_parent.description: Organic compounds containing a gallate moiety glycosidically linked to a catechin.
direct_parent.name: Catechin gallates

intermediate_nodes.description: Flavans that bear and hydroxyl group at position 3 (B ring), but not at position 4.
intermediate_nodes.name: Flavan-3-ols

intermediate_nodes.description: Compounds containing a catechin moiety, which is a 3,4-dihydro-2-chromene-3,5.7-tiol.
intermediate_nodes.name: Catechins

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Compounds containing a flavan moiety, with a structure characterized by a 2-phenyl-3,4-dihydro-2H-1-benzopyran skeleton.
subclass.name: Flavans

superclass.description: Organic compounds that are synthesized either from the amino acid phenylalanine (phenylpropanoids) or the decarboxylative condensation of malonyl-CoA (polyketides). Phenylpropanoids are aromatic compounds based on the phenylpropane skeleton. Polyketides usually consist of alternating carbonyl and methylene groups (beta-polyketones), biogenetically derived from repeated condensation of acetyl coenzyme A (via malonyl coenzyme A), and usually the compounds derived from them by further condensations.
superclass.name: Phenylpropanoids and polyketides
